nodes.context: Russian hacking group behind Dridex malware, active since 2009, hierarchical structure.
Hacking group whose core member Vyacheslav Penchukov was a personal friend of Evil Corp leader.
Ransomware group; a 2021 attack initially attributed to REvil may have been by Evil Corp.
Ransomware group that Evil Corp affiliated with between 2022 and 2024.
Threat actor linked to Evil Corp by Mandiant in 2022.
Russian paramilitary group; an Evil Corp member participated in a hackathon organized by them.

edges.context: Evil Corp leader Yakubets was a personal friend of Jabber Zeus core member Penchukov.
A 2021 ransomware attack initially attributed to REvil may have been by Evil Corp.
Evil Corp affiliated with LockBit between 2022 and 2024, using their ransomware.
Mandiant linked Evil Corp to threat actor UNC2165 in 2022.
Evil Corp member Igor Turashev placed third in a hackathon organized by Wagner Group in 2022.
